episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 494: Spidey Market In Flux
episode.description:
The guys walk you through the latest meta shifts, fast moving cards, online action and take a look at the recent shifts in Spider-Man sealed product pricing.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
